seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith is a 58-year-old male
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith is being seen for evaluation of high blood sugar
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith reports his blood sugars at home have been creeping up slightly
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith's home blood sugars have been running in the 300s
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith feels his blood sugar is not under control
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith's diet has not changed recently
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith does not take sugar with his tea
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith believes most of his sugar intake comes from fruit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith denies recent fever or chills
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith reports a bit of right knee joint pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith does not recall any specific injury precipitating his right knee pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith had nausea a couple of days ago associated with sitting in the back of a car
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith denies current burning with urination
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith has a past history of reflux
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith was previously started on protonix for reflux
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith feels his reflux is a bit better on protonix
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith no longer wakes up at night with reflux
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith has a history of congestive heart failure
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith has not noticed recent weight gain or fluid retention
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith is able to sleep lying flat, preferring to sleep on his side
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith has a history of right rotator cuff problems
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith's right rotator cuff is currently doing surprisingly well
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam Keith's thyroid is mildly enlarged
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam Keith's heart rhythm is regular
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam Keith's lungs are clear
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam Keith's abdomen is soft
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam Keith's right knee has erythema and an insect bite with associated fluctuance
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam Keith has right-sided lower extremity edema
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith's vital signs are within normal limits
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith's Lyme titer is mildly elevated
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith's rapid strep test is positive
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician assesses that Keith has hyperglycemia likely related to infections
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to treat Keith's positive strep with amoxicillin 500 mg three times daily
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith is instructed to complete the full course of amoxicillin even if he feels better
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician orders amoxicillin 500 mg three times daily for 10 days
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a Lyme Western blot PCR to evaluate for acute Lyme disease
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The nurse will set Keith up for the ordered tests
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician confirms that the Lyme titer relates to Lyme disease
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith is worried about having alpha-gal syndrome
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith has eaten meat over the last couple of days
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician thinks Keith does not have alpha-gal syndrome
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician states Keith's elevated blood sugar may reflect an inflammatory response
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order additional tests related to Keith's concern about alpha-gal syndrome
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith is instructed to call the clinician if anything happens after the visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
